steps.title: Test the most useful input
steps.content: Every choice gives $f(0)=16$, so that row cannot distinguish them. Use $x=-1$, where the table says $f(-1)=10$.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
Substituting $x=-1$ gives $14$, $18$, $24$, and $10$ for choices A, B, C, and D, respectively. Only choice D matches the table.
The answer is D.
